full_name: Flic en Flac Apartment - Remote Work Optimized

remote_work.response: Perfect for remote work! High-speed fiber internet | Dedicated workspace | Stable connection for video calls | Speed test results available on request

long_term.response: Long-term stays welcome (2+ months)! Special monthly rates | All utilities included | Internet, cleaning, maintenance included | Contact for custom pricing

location.response: Flic en Flac - popular beach town | Beautiful public beach nearby | Restaurants, shops within walking distance | Perfect work-life balance location

complaint_patterns: Internet speed inconsistency during peak hours
things_to_avoid: Don't guarantee specific Mbps speeds — say "suitable for remote work and streaming"
operational_notes: Popular with digital nomads and remote workers
Sunset views from balcony are a major selling point
Nearby Cascavelle mall for groceries (5 min drive)

response_templates.remote_work: Our apartment is popular with remote workers! WiFi suitable for video calls and streaming. Dedicated workspace area available. Flic en Flac offers great cafes for a change of scenery.

brand_voice_reminders: Paragraphs over bullet points in guest messages

services_to_mention.transfers: Airport transfers via mauritiusattractions.com (code FRIDAYMU for 10% off)
services_to_mention.car_rental: Car rental services available on request
services_to_mention.luggage: Luggage drop-off available for early arrivals / late departures
services_to_mention.activities: Local tours and activities bookable through our partners
